pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states: 'Create a new form with the title COVID-19 Screening'
Task description explicitly states field 1 label as 'Has Fever?', metadata claims 'Fever'
Task description specifies Type: Yes/No (or Checkbox/Radio) for field 1. Keywords are reasonable representation of this specification.
Task description explicitly states field 2 label as 'New Cough?', metadata claims 'Cough'
Task description specifies Type: Yes/No (or Checkbox/Radio) for field 2. Keywords are reasonable representation of this specification.
Task description explicitly states field 3 label as 'Travel History', metadata claims 'Travel'
Task description specifies Type: Text (or Text Area) for field 3. Keywords are reasonable representation of this specification.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a custom COVID-19 Screening form in NOSH ChartingSystem (real open-source EHR system using Docker container shihjay2/nosh2:latest with MariaDB 10.11 database). The form title 'COVID-19 Screening' is correctly specified in metadata. However, the field labels in metadata are INCORRECT: they should be 'Has Fever?', 'New Cough?', and 'Travel History' per the task description, not the abbreviated 'Fever', 'Cough', and 'Travel' in metadata. The field types (Yes/No for Fever and Cough, Text for Travel History) are correctly represented in the type_keywords. The task involves synthetic data creation (form template creation), not real patient data.
